apihelp-query+extracts-summary: Waxay soo celisaa qoraal cad ama HTML xaddidan oo laga soo xigtay bogagga la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+extracts-param-chars: Immisa xaraf ayaa la soo celinayaa. Qoraalka dhabta ah ee la soo celiyo waxa laga yaabaa inuu wax yar ka dheeraado.
apihelp-query+extracts-param-sentences: Immisa jumladood ayaa la soo celinayaa.
apihelp-query+extracts-param-limit: Immisa soo koobid ayaa la soo celinayaa. (Soo koobidyo badan waxa kaliya oo la soo celin karaa haddii exintro la dejiyo true.)
apihelp-query+extracts-param-intro: Soo celi kaliya nuxurka ka hor qaybta ugu horreysa.
apihelp-query+extracts-param-plaintext: Soo celi soo koobidda qoraal cad halkii aad ka soo celin lahayd HTML xaddidan.
apihelp-query+extracts-param-sectionform: Sida loo qaabeeyo qaybaha marka lagu jiro qaabka qoraal cad:
apihelp-query+extracts-paramvalue-sectio: Matalaadda gudaha ee module-kan (cinwaannada qaybaha oo lagu hormariyey <ASCII 1><ASCII 2><section level><ASCII 2><ASCII 1>).
apihelp-query+extracts-example-1: Soo hel soo koobid 175 xaraf ah
apiwarn-textextracts-limit: <var>exlimit</var> aad buu ugu weynaa codsiga soo koobidda maqaal buuxa, waxaa hoos loogu dhigay $1.
apiwarn-textextracts-unsupportedmodel: $1 wuxuu leeyahay qaab nuxur $2, kaas oo aan la taageerin; sidaas darteed waxaa la soo celinayaa soo koobid madhan.
apiwarn-textextracts-title-in-file-names: Soo koobid loogu talagalay cinwaan ku jira meesha-magac ee Faylka ayaa la codsaday, waxba lama soo celin.
apiwarn-textextracts-sentences-and-html: Halbeegga <var>$1sentences</var> waxa laga yaabaa inuu keeno natiijooyin aan la filayn marka lagu isticmaalo qaabka HTML.
apiwarn-textextracts-malformed-html: HTML waxa laga yaabaa inuu noqdo mid khaldan iyo/ama aan isu dheellitirin, waxaana laga yaabaa in laga reebo sawirrada ku jira qoraalka. Isticmaal adiga oo mas’uul ka ah. Dhibaatooyinka la yaqaan waxa lagu taxay https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:TextExtracts#Caveats.
